title: Buddypress
body: [Buddypress in Spanish, Buddypress-es.org](http://buddypress-es.org/). A new form of collaboration has been born. Thanks to Buddypress and WPMU, you will be able to create your own social network. The intention of buddypress-es.org, apart from creating a Spanish-language social network, is to publicize this new way of understanding WPMU, a Blog server, now converted, thanks to Buddypress, into a 2.0 community. In Buddypress-es, you can find: Community, Blogs, Collaboration, Translation for Buddypress, Buddypress Help, Etc… Buddypress Beta1 has already been launched. Buddypress-es works with Buddypress Beta1 and WPMU 2.7
